2026-04-06T15:47:43.4028993Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4029543Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4029980Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4030353Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4030660Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4030896Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4031055Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4031234Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4031407Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4031638Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4031856Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4032150Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-06T15:47:43.4032412Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

there are no test-backed code snippets to populate the README Examples section\\n- A non-standard \\u0026#34;Documentation\\u0026#34; section is present instead of following the canonical README template structure\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/playwright/Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright/README.md` (edit)\\n\\nReplace the current **Key concepts** section:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n```\\n\\nwith:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nThe `Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright` library provides the following primary resource types:\\n\\n- **`PlaywrightWorkspaceResource`** — Represents a Microsoft Playwright Testing workspace. A workspace is the top-level resource that hosts your Playwright test infrastructure. You can create, update, and delete workspaces, as well as configure managed identity and enable reporting.\\n- **`PlaywrightQuotaResource`** — Represents a subscription-level quota for Playwright Testing resources.\\n- **`PlaywrightWorkspaceQuotaResource`** — Represents a workspace-level quota.\\n\\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n```\\n\\nRemove the non-standard **Documentation** section (the block containing Quickstart, API References, and Authentication links under `## Documentation`) and instead incorporate those links into the **Next steps** section.\\n\\nReplace the **Examples** section:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\nCode samples for using the management library for .NET can be found in the following locations\\n- [.NET Management Library Code Samples]((aka.ms/redacted)\\n```\\n\\nwith:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Create a Playwright workspace\\n\\n````C# Snippet:PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateOrUpdate\\n```\\n````\\n\\n### Update a workspace to enable reporting and set storage URI\\n\\n````\\n```\\n````\\n\\n### Configure managed identity on a workspace\\n\\n````C# Snippet:PlaywrightWorkspace_ConfigureIdentity\\n```\\n```\\n\\nFor more samples, see the [.NET Management Library Code Samples]((aka.ms/redacted)\\n````\\n\\nReplace the **Next steps** section:\\n\\n```\\n## Next steps\\n\\nFor more information about Microsoft Azure SDK, see [this website]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n```\\n\\nwith:\\n\\n```\\n## Next steps\\n\\n- Azure.Identity](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/README.md)\\n- [More Azure SDK for .NET samples]((azure.github.io/redacted)\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate a new sample test file at `sdk/playwright/Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright/tests/Samples/Sample1_PlaywrightWorkspace.cs`:\\n\\n```\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright.Models;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Playwright.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample1_PlaywrightWorkspace\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample builds\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateOrUpdateWorkspace()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateOrUpdate\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\n            string subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            string resourceGroupName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            string workspaceName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            AzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\\u0026#34;/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\\u0026#34;))\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceCollection workspaces = resourceGroup.GetPlaywrightWorkspaces();\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceData workspaceData = new PlaywrightWorkspaceData(location);\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await workspaces.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                workspaceName,\\n                workspaceData);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource workspace = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created workspace: {workspace.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample builds\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task UpdateReportingAndStorage()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:PlaywrightWorkspace_UpdateReportingAndStorage\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\n            string subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            string resourceGroupName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            string workspaceName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\\u0026#34;/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\\u0026#34;))\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource workspace = await resourceGroup\\n                .GetPlaywrightWorkspaces()\\n                .GetAsync(workspaceName);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspacePatch patch = new PlaywrightWorkspacePatch\\n            {\\n                Properties = new PlaywrightWorkspaceUpdateProperties\\n                {\\n                    Reporting = PlaywrightEnablementStatus.Enabled,\\n                    StorageUri = new Uri(\\u0026#34;https://.blob.core.windows.net\\u0026#34;)\\n                }\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await workspace.UpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                patch);\\n\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Updated workspace reporting: {lro.Value.Data.Properties.Reporting}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample builds\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task ConfigureIdentity()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:PlaywrightWorkspace_ConfigureIdentity\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\n            string subscriptionId = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            string resourceGroupName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n            string workspaceName = \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;;\\n\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\\u0026#34;/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\\u0026#34;))\\n                .GetResourceGroupAsync(resourceGroupName);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspaceResource workspace = await resourceGroup\\n                .GetPlaywrightWorkspaces()\\n                .GetAsync(workspaceName);\\n\\n            PlaywrightWorkspacePatch patch = new PlaywrightWorkspacePatch\\n            {\\n                Identity = new ManagedServiceIdentity(ManagedServiceIdentityType.SystemAssigned)\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await workspace.UpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                patch);\\n\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Identity type: {lro.Value.Data.Identity?.ManagedServiceIdentityType}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nFor each snippet, the `` → README placeholder mapping is:\\n| Snippet name | README section |\\n|---|---|\\n| `PlaywrightWorkspace_CreateOrUpdate` |
